name: analysis_pack_max_v1
description: Maximal analysis pack (read-only). Adds many optional groups (time/network/conversion-action segmentation, landing pages, placements, RSA asset performance, budgets/settings) for deep diagnosis. Export with --include-optional for the full firehose.

ad_group_ad.resource_name.description: Ad group ad stable identifier (resource name).

asset_group.resource_name.description: Asset group stable identifier (resource name). Useful for Performance Max (PMax).

asset_group.id.description: Asset group numeric id. Useful for Performance Max (PMax).

asset.resource_name.description: Asset stable identifier (resource name). Useful for Performance Max assets and extensions.

asset_group_asset.field_type.description: Asset group field type (what role an asset plays in a PMax asset group).

ad_group_criterion.resource_name.description: Ad group criterion stable identifier (resource name). Used for keywords and other criteria.

keyword.text.description: Keyword text (when the criterion is a keyword).

keyword.match_type.description: Keyword match type (when the criterion is a keyword).

segments.device.description: Device segment (DESKTOP, MOBILE, TABLET, CONNECTED_TV, OTHER).

segments.ad_network_type.description: Ad network type segment (e.g., SEARCH, CONTENT).

segments.conversion_action.description: Conversion action resource name segment (for breakdowns).

geographic_view.location_type.description: Geo view location type (presence vs interest).

geographic_view.country_criterion_id.description: Country criterion id (when exporting via geographic_view).

age_range_view.resource_name.description: Age range view stable identifier (resource name).

landing_page_view.unexpanded_final_url.description: Landing page URL (unexpanded). Useful for diagnosing landing page winners.

detail_placement_view.placement.description: Placement string (URL / app / YouTube channel/video), where available.

gaql_templates.base: SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, campaign.name, campaign.status, campaign.advertising_channel_type, campaign.advertising_channel_sub_type FROM campaign WHERE campaign.status != 'REMOVED'
SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group.name, ad_group.status, ad_group.type FROM ad_group WHERE ad_group.status != 'REMOVED'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group_ad.resource_name, ad_group_ad.status, ad_group_ad.ad.id, ad_group_ad.ad.type, ad_group_ad.ad.final_urls, ad_group_ad.ad.expanded_text_ad.headline_part1, ad_group_ad.ad.expanded_text_ad.headline_part2, ad_group_ad.ad.expanded_text_ad.headline_part3, ad_group_ad.ad.expanded_text_ad.description, ad_group_ad.ad.expanded_text_ad.description2, ad_group_ad.ad.responsive_search_ad.headlines, ad_group_ad.ad.responsive_search_ad.descriptions, ad_group_ad.ad.responsive_display_ad.headlines, ad_group_ad.ad.responsive_display_ad.descriptions, ad_group_ad.ad.responsive_display_ad.long_headline FROM ad_group_ad WHERE ad_group_ad.status != 'REMOVED'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group_ad.resource_name, ad_group_ad.ad.id, segments.date, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM ad_group_ad WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, campaign.name, campaign.status, campaign.start_date_time, campaign.end_date_time, campaign.serving_status, campaign.bidding_strategy_type, campaign.campaign_budget, campaign.network_settings.target_google_search, campaign.network_settings.target_search_network, campaign.network_settings.target_content_network, campaign.network_settings.target_partner_search_network FROM campaign WHERE campaign.status != 'REMOVED'

SELECT customer.id, campaign_budget.resource_name, campaign_budget.id, campaign_budget.name, campaign_budget.amount_micros, campaign_budget.delivery_method, campaign_budget.period, campaign_budget.type, campaign_budget.status FROM campaign_budget

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, segments.date, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM campaign WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group_ad.resource_name, ad_group_ad.ad.id, segments.date, segments.device, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM ad_group_ad WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group_ad.resource_name, ad_group_ad.ad.id, segments.date, segments.ad_network_type, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM ad_group_ad WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group_ad.resource_name, ad_group_ad.ad.id, segments.date, segments.day_of_week, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM ad_group_ad WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, segments.date, segments.hour, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM campaign WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group_ad.resource_name, ad_group_ad.ad.id, segments.date, segments.conversion_action, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM ad_group_ad WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, segments.date, geographic_view.location_type, geographic_view.country_criterion_id, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM geographic_view WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, segments.date, geographic_view.location_type, segments.geo_target_region, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM geographic_view WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, segments.date, geographic_view.location_type, segments.geo_target_city, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM geographic_view WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, segments.date, gender_view.resource_name, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM gender_view WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, segments.date, age_range_view.resource_name, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM age_range_view WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, segments.date, search_term_view.search_term, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM search_term_view WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group_criterion.resource_name, ad_group_criterion.keyword.text, ad_group_criterion.keyword.match_type, segments.date, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM keyword_view WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, segments.date, landing_page_view.unexpanded_final_url, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM landing_page_view WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, segments.date, detail_placement_view.placement, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM detail_placement_view WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group_ad.resource_name, ad_group_ad.ad.id, segments.date, ad_group_ad_asset_view.field_type, ad_group_ad_asset_view.performance_label, asset.resource_name, asset.type, asset.text_asset.text FROM ad_group_ad_asset_view WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'
SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, asset_group.id, asset_group.resource_name, asset_group.name, asset_group.status FROM asset_group WHERE asset_group.status != 'REMOVED'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, asset_group.id, asset_group.resource_name, asset.resource_name, asset.type, asset_group_asset.field_type FROM asset_group_asset WHERE asset_group_asset.status != 'REMOVED'
SELECT asset.resource_name, asset.type, asset.name, asset.text_asset.text, asset.image_asset.full_size.url, asset.youtube_video_asset.youtube_video_id FROM asset
